dummyKeyCUSTOMER_ADDRESS.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

imageAltTexts: Logitech M325S Wireless Ambidextrous Optical Mouse, Black (910-006825)~#|#~9F4FD586-634E-428F-BE037529FA82A2FF_sc7
Logitech M325S Wireless Ambidextrous Optical Mouse, Black (910-006825)~#|#~84F7B652-DDC3-431E-92958190626318C2_sc7
Logitech M325S Wireless Ambidextrous Optical Mouse, Black (910-006825)~#|#~BF264D1D-F572-4212-88ABA04AD08248FA_sc7
Logitech M325S Wireless Ambidextrous Optical Mouse, Black (910-006825)~#|#~8AA7721E-2AF3-4EE7-A6D4119B3C1531CC_sc7
00000006831849974399.title: Logitech M325S Wireless Ambidextrous Optical Mouse, Black (910-006825)

paragraph: Reduce the clutter on employees' desks with the help of this Logitech M325s black ambidextrous wireless optical mouse. Pre-installed with AA batteries that last up to 18 months, the mouse connects to computers with a small USB receiver. A lightweight and compact design makes the mouse easy to transport, perfect for use with laptop computers in or out of the office. A sleek design gives the mouse a professional appearance ideal for use in a business setting.
bullets: Logitech M325s optical mouse built with advanced optical tracking for enhanced precision
Speedy 2.4GHz wireless connectivity for improved responsiveness
Contoured 3-button design for comfort and quick scrolling
Includes single AA battery that lasts up to 18 months for convenient use; smart sleep mode reduces power consumption

The tiny Logitech Unifying Nano-receiver stays in your laptop-so it's less likely to be lost-and gives you a reliable connection with virtually no delays or dropouts. Plus, you can easily add compatible wireless devices to the same receiver.
Compact and ambidextrous design for single-handed operation
Small-size wireless receiver can stay in your laptop for convenient use. Please note: When installing this mouse the receiver can be found inside of the mouse.

At home, at school, at work- forget about tricky finger maneuvers with your laptop touchpad. Enjoy precise clicking and pointing while navigating your favorite websites thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking.

Required: Available USB Port Windows® 10, 11 or later macOS 10.5 or later ChromeOS Certified Works With Chromebook™ ? Linux® kernel 2.6+ or later Internet access required to download optional customization app Logi Options+
Measures 2.24" x 3.73" x 1.54" for a space-saving design
Three-year limited warranty for added quality assurance
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Navigate on your computer freely and precisely with this Logitech M325S optical wireless mouse.
expandedDescr:
Compatibility
The Logitech M235 is compatible with Windows, Mac and Linux-based operating systems, allowing for use with dual-boot machines or across a variety of machines running different OS options. Its unifying receiver works equally well with other compatible Bluetooth devices such as wireless keyboards or headphones, so you don't have to clog up your USB ports with receivers for every device you connect.

Precise Performance
The Logitech M235's sensitive optical sensor is highly responsive to every movement of your hand. Its 2.4 GHz wireless connection is as reliable as a wired connection, so there's no frustrating lag or otherwise erratic behavior. The mouse's textured rubber grip lets you move it with precision while also reducing finger fatigue, even through hours of scrolling.

Aesthetic Utility
With its bold red color and sleek form, the Logitech M235 wireless optical mouse adds a dash of vibrancy to your workplace. A dedicated scroll button lets you smoothly move up and down pages so you can browse through documents and websites with ease.

00000006831849974399.skuDescription: Logitech M325S Wireless Ambidextrous Optical USB Mouse Black 910006825

TRU RED™ 8.5" x 11" Copy Paper, 20 lbs., 92 Brightness, 600 Sheets/Ream, 6 Reams/Carton (TR62091)~#|#~65E7D95D-2523-44B7-B441DE92D8878A21_sc7
00000006831849984657.title: TRU RED™ 8.5" x 11" Copy Paper, 20 lbs., 92 Brightness, 600 Sheets/Ream, 6 Reams/Carton (TR62091)

paragraph: Expect high-quality results for home and office documents with this printer paper. This 20 lb. weight paper is engineered to prevent jamming, making it ideal for use in all machines. With a 92 brightness rating, this paper delivers crisp text and images in black and white. Featuring 3600 sheets, this Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper provides the right amount to keep up with your daily demand.
bullets: Copy printer paper that is best for high volume, black & white printing
Paper weight: 20 lbs.
Sheet Dimension: 8.5W" x 11"L (US Letter)
Brightness rating of 92 for sharp, clear print results
White paper with a Matte finish
600 sheets per ream, 6 reams per carton, 3600 sheets total
Paper is acid-free to prevent crumbling or yellowing
Engineered to prevent jamming
Designed for high-speed printers
headliner: Keep your copy room stocked with this 6-ream carton of Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper to handle everyday printing.

00000006831849974399.title: Logitech M325S Wireless Ambidextrous Optical Mouse, Black (910-006825)

paragraph: Reduce the clutter on employees' desks with the help of this Logitech M325s black ambidextrous wireless optical mouse. Pre-installed with AA batteries that last up to 18 months, the mouse connects to computers with a small USB receiver. A lightweight and compact design makes the mouse easy to transport, perfect for use with laptop computers in or out of the office. A sleek design gives the mouse a professional appearance ideal for use in a business setting.
bullets: Logitech M325s optical mouse built with advanced optical tracking for enhanced precision
Speedy 2.4GHz wireless connectivity for improved responsiveness
Contoured 3-button design for comfort and quick scrolling
Includes single AA battery that lasts up to 18 months for convenient use; smart sleep mode reduces power consumption

The tiny Logitech Unifying Nano-receiver stays in your laptop-so it's less likely to be lost-and gives you a reliable connection with virtually no delays or dropouts. Plus, you can easily add compatible wireless devices to the same receiver.
Compact and ambidextrous design for single-handed operation
Small-size wireless receiver can stay in your laptop for convenient use. Please note: When installing this mouse the receiver can be found inside of the mouse.

At home, at school, at work- forget about tricky finger maneuvers with your laptop touchpad. Enjoy precise clicking and pointing while navigating your favorite websites thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking.

Required: Available USB Port Windows® 10, 11 or later macOS 10.5 or later ChromeOS Certified Works With Chromebook™ ? Linux® kernel 2.6+ or later Internet access required to download optional customization app Logi Options+
Measures 2.24" x 3.73" x 1.54" for a space-saving design
Three-year limited warranty for added quality assurance
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Navigate on your computer freely and precisely with this Logitech M325S optical wireless mouse.
expandedDescr:
Compatibility
The Logitech M235 is compatible with Windows, Mac and Linux-based operating systems, allowing for use with dual-boot machines or across a variety of machines running different OS options. Its unifying receiver works equally well with other compatible Bluetooth devices such as wireless keyboards or headphones, so you don't have to clog up your USB ports with receivers for every device you connect.

Precise Performance
The Logitech M235's sensitive optical sensor is highly responsive to every movement of your hand. Its 2.4 GHz wireless connection is as reliable as a wired connection, so there's no frustrating lag or otherwise erratic behavior. The mouse's textured rubber grip lets you move it with precision while also reducing finger fatigue, even through hours of scrolling.

Aesthetic Utility
With its bold red color and sleek form, the Logitech M235 wireless optical mouse adds a dash of vibrancy to your workplace. A dedicated scroll button lets you smoothly move up and down pages so you can browse through documents and websites with ease.
